title: What's new in Google Cloud's agent platform
summary: Google Cloud announced an updated agent platform featuring unified Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform with Agent Builder, no-code/low-code Agent Designer, and an Agent Registry for reusable components. The platform includes enterprise governance, management capabilities, time-travel debugging, integrated evaluation, simulation, and expanded Agent Development Kit with agent-to-agent communication and secure code execution.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video walks through updates to the company's agent platform, now consolidated under the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform. It covers the building and management surfaces: Agent Builder, a no-code/low-code Agent Designer, and an Agent Registry for reusable components, alongside enterprise governance and management capabilities. The platform additions matter for teams moving agents into production, where reliability and oversight depend on tooling beyond the model itself. Concrete takeaways include time-travel debugging, integrated evaluation, simulation, and an expanded Agent Development Kit that adds agent-to-agent communication and secure code execution.
